stories.headline: GOP senator who voted to convict Trump in impeachment trial loses primary
stories.summary: Sen. Bill Cassidy of Louisiana failed to make the runoff in his GOP Senate primary five years after his vote to convict Donald Trump, which led the president to call for his ouster.

stories.headline: Trump’s pick for Republican primary beats senator who voted to impeach him
stories.summary: Julia Letlow advances to second round after US president accused Bill Cassidy of disloyalty

stories.headline: WHO Declares Congo Ebola Outbreak Global Health Emergency
stories.summary: The World Health Organization declared an Ebola outbreak in Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda a public health emergency of international concern, warning that a rare virus strain with no approved vaccine or treatment may already be spreading more widely than detected.

stories.headline: Trump-backed challenger defeats Republican senator who voted to convict president
stories.summary: Trump threw his full support behind Julia Letlow in Louisiana's high-stakes contest, branding the incumbent "disloyal".

stories.headline: Record Drone Attack on Moscow Kills Three, Targets Refinery
stories.summary: Russia’s capital and the surrounding Moscow region came under record drone attacks overnight, leaving at least three people killed and over a dozen wounded.

stories.headline: Cassidy Loses Senate Primary in Louisiana, as Trump Vanquishes G.O.P. Foe
stories.summary: Senator Bill Cassidy, a two-term Republican who voted to convict President Trump in his 2021 impeachment trial, could not muster enough votes to continue to a runoff next month.

stories.headline: Tech founders use AI-generated images to poke fun at Anthony Albanese in protest against tax changes

stories.headline: Russia launches nearly 300 drones at Ukraine as 528 bodies of Ukrainian soldiers are returned

stories.headline: Returning from China, Trump is Ambiguous Over Taiwan
stories.summary: President Donald Trump said he made no commitment to Chinese President Xi Jinping over Taiwan, and would make a decision soon over a planned $14 billion arms deal with the island. Bloomberg White House Correspondent Courtney Subramanian and Reporter Michelle Kaske joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura this morning on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the summit’s deals, sticking points and unfinished business. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Latvia’s President Nominates Kulbergs to Form New Government
